
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 4 - "Transformations".

The examples for this chapter require 45 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	ctm.ps
	cube1.ps
	cube2.ps
	cube3.ps
	cube4.ps
	cube5.ps
	cube6.ps
	cube7.ps
	diamond1.ps
	diamond2.ps
	flip1.ps (*)
	flip2.ps (*)
	intro.ps
	order1.ps
	order2.ps
	order3.ps
	order4.ps
	rotate1.ps
	rotate2.ps
	rotate3.ps
	scale.ps
	shear1.ps
	shear2.ps
	shear3.ps
	shear4.ps
	shear5.ps
	strkadj1.ps
	strkadj2.ps (1)
	strkadj3.ps
	strkadj4.ps (*)
	translt1.ps
	translt2.ps
	translt3.ps
	triangle.ps

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	stradj2.ps will not run in its current state. You must substitute
	a valid value for x on the 3rd to last line in the example.
	
